title: AuditRecord APLUS v1
description: Schema for a single record in the dot.ink tamper-evident audit chain. Mirrors verify_audit.py digest logic exactly. Chain digest formula: SHA256(prev_digest + '|' + kind + '|' + intent_id + '|' + seq + '|' + timestamp). Records without audit_chain_seq predate chain-linking; verifier emits MISSING_CHAIN_SEQ warning and cannot verify those. STRICT deployments must prohibit unchained records from genesis.

kind.description: Record type. CHECKPOINT records carry Merkle root over the preceding window.

intent_id.description: Intent identifier. May be empty for non-decision record types.

seq.description: Server-local sequence counter. Distinct from audit_chain_seq.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 datetime. Used in digest computation — must not be modified after write.

audit_chain_seq.description: Monotonically increasing position in the tamper-evident chain. Present on all chained records.

prev_digest.description: SHA-256 digest of the preceding chain entry (or GENESIS_DIGEST for seq=1). Used by verifier to detect chain breaks.

audit_digest.description: SHA-256 of SHA256(prev_digest + '|' + kind + '|' + intent_id + '|' + seq + '|' + timestamp). Recomputed by verify_audit.py on every record.

policy_epoch.description: Active policy epoch at record time. Verifier enforces monotonicity: no record may have epoch < previous record's epoch.

break_glass_active.description: True if a break-glass window was active when this record was written. Verifier emits BREAK_GLASS_WINDOW finding for APPROVED/BLOCKED records with this set.

profile.description: Deployment profile active at record time. Used by verifier to determine which rules apply.

merkle_root.description: CHECKPOINT only. Merkle root over audit_digest values of all records since the last checkpoint. Verifier recomputes and compares.

record_count.description: CHECKPOINT only. Number of records covered by merkle_root. Verifier uses this to select the correct digest window.

_source_file.description: Added by load_records() in verify_audit.py. Not present in the raw audit file.

_source_line.description: Added by load_records() in verify_audit.py. Not present in the raw audit file.

allOf.description: Any record that has audit_chain_seq must also have prev_digest and audit_digest. This is checked by the verifier as MISSING_DIGEST.
CHECKPOINT records must have merkle_root, record_count, and full chain fields.
BREAK_GLASS records must have approvers and expiry_utc. Missing either is a verifier FAIL.
